user.title: Create Entity Group
user.description: Create a group of entities to monitor for availability.

data_description.bad_states: Entity states that indicate an entity is offline (e.g., unavailable, unknown).
data_description.cooldown: How long (in seconds) an entity must stay in a bad state before it is marked offline. Prevents false alarms from brief disconnections.
data_description.staleness_threshold: If an entity hasn't changed state for this many minutes, mark it as degraded. This catches entities that report 'available' but have actually stopped sending data. Set to 0 to disable.

data_description.battery_threshold: Flag entities whose battery falls below this percentage. The 'low' state is also automatically detected. Volt-based entities are not supported. Use entities that report battery as a percentage or support the 'low' state.
data_description.availability_windows: Time windows for tracking group availability history (e.g. today, 3d, 7d).

battery_mapping.title: Battery Entity Mapping
battery_mapping.description: Confirm or change the battery sensor for each monitored entity. Leave empty for entities without batteries. Supports numeric (%) and text states ('low').

error.no_entities: You must select at least one entity.

abort.already_configured: A group with this name already exists.

init.title: Edit Entity Group
init.description: Modify monitoring settings for this group.
